watchHistory.emptyHint: Records will appear here after watching
watchHistory.deleteConfirm: Confirm deletion? This action cannot be undone.
watchHistory.deleteError: Failed to delete, please try again

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure display language, sync interval, and proxy.
settings.displayLanguageHint: BCP 47 language code for TMDB translated titles. Re-sync after changing.
settings.syncIntervalHint: Auto-sync frequency. Range: 1–10080 minutes (up to 1 week).
settings.httpProxyHint: Optional. Routes TMDB and Trakt requests through a proxy. Leave empty to use env default.
settings.validationIntervalError: Sync interval must be an integer between 1 and 10080.
settings.validationLanguageError: Display language format is incorrect, please use BCP 47 format (e.g. zh-CN, en-US).
settings.validationProxyError: Proxy address must start with http:// or https://.
